title: Tangy Shattering Dutch Green Beans Braised
description: A kid-friendly Dutch dish featuring tender green beans and a tangy sauce. This recipe is perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: In a large saucepan, melt 1 tablespoon of butter over medium heat.
Add the sliced onion and cook until softened, about 3 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Add the green beans, chicken broth, white vinegar, brown sugar, and Dijon mustard to the saucepan.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, until the green beans are tender, about 10 minutes.
In a small saucepan, melt the remaining 1 tablespoon of butter over medium heat.
Add the tempering chocolate and stir until melted and smooth.
Serve the green beans hot, garnished with the melted chocolate.
Toss the green beans with the melted chocolate to coat, if desired.
Serve immediately, garnished with additional chocolate if desired.
